subject: [PATCH 3/4] mm: page_alloc: move capture_control to the page allocator

2026-06-26.patch_summary: This patch moves the per-task capture_control to the page allocator, allowing it to carry allocation-side information that compaction's compact_control does not. The capture_control is passed through try_to_compact_pages() and compact_zone_order() instead of a bare struct page **. This change is necessary because defrag_mode promotes sub-block allocations to pageblock-order compaction, which targets the larger order while capture should remain at the original allocation order. The patch makes no functional changes.
